title: The Droplet
description: A client-side modpack made to optimize and rejuvenate Minecraft's graphics, elevating the vanilla experience to new heights of enjoyment and immersion.
body:
# The Droplet

## A fully client-sided modpack designed to optimize and enhance the visuals of Minecraft

Step into a world of enhanced Minecraft experiences with this client-sided modpack! Dive into stunning visual upgrades and performance-boosting mods that'll make your experience smoother and more delightful than ever before. 

## Links
Feel free to join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/uQShC434BW) server, if you have any further questions or just want to be part of a friendly community.
